content.text:
Chemistry Lab Sessions 1
Semester:
1  |
Teaching Unit:
Methodology Unit (MU 1)  |
Course Code:
MU 1
Course Objectives
Introduce students to safe laboratory practice in chemistry.
Teach basic chemistry laboratory techniques and the use of measuring instruments.
Prerequisites
A solid understanding of physical sciences at the secondary school level.
Syllabus
Safety rules and introduction to chemistry lab work
Preparation of a solution
Determination of molar mass
Acid-base titrations
Redox titrations
Assessment Method
Continuous assessment: 50%
Final exam: 50%
References
Y. JEAN, Structure électronique des molécules : 1 de l'atome aux molécules simples 3ème Ed, Dunod, Paris, (2003).
M. GUYMONT, Structure de la matière ; Belin Coll., Paris, (2003).
M. KARAPETIANTZ, Constitution de la matière, Ed. Mir, Moscou, (1980).
